canonical_definition: A PDDL-grounded benchmark containing 942 LLM-generated scenarios for evaluating physical safety in embodied decision-making, split into EMBODYGUARDmal (malicious commands) and EMBODYGUARDsit (situational hazards).
papers: How Far CanLLMs Improve from Experience? Measuring Test-Time Learning Ability inLLMs with Human Comparison

definitions.text: A PDDL-grounded benchmark containing 942 LLM-generated scenarios for evaluating physical safety in embodied decision-making, split into EMBODYGUARDmal (malicious commands) and EMBODYGUARDsit (situational hazards).
definitions.paper: How Far CanLLMs Improve from Experience? Measuring Test-Time Learning Ability inLLMs with Human Comparison

characterization: A PDDL-grounded benchmark containing 942 LLM-generated scenarios for evaluating physical safety in embodied decision-making, split into EMBODYGUARDmal (malicious commands) and EMBODYGUARDsit (situational hazards).
